title: teucrium capitatum subsp. valentinum
intro: Teucrium capitatum subsp. valentinum, also known as Valerian Teucrium or Rock Teucrium, is a subspecies of the Teucrium capitatum plant, a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Teucrium capitatum subsp. valentinum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. Teucrium capitatum subsp. valentinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies for various health concerns.
